disclaimer.title: Research Tool Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: IMMI-Case is an independent research tool providing access to publicly available Australian immigration tribunal and court decisions sourced from AustLII (Australasian Legal Information Institute). All information presented is for academic research and reference purposes only and does not constitute legal advice, nor does it represent the position of any government authority. Case data may be incomplete or contain extraction errors. For legal advice regarding immigration matters, consult a registered migration agent or qualified legal practitioner.
disclaimer.data_source: Data sourced from AustLII (Australasian Legal Information Institute)
disclaimer.not_legal_advice: Not legal advice — for research and reference purposes only

lineage.title: Court Lineage Timeline
lineage.subtitle: Interactive visualization of Australian immigration court and tribunal succession from 2000 to present
lineage.subtitle_empty: No case data available for lineage visualization
lineage.no_data_description: Download cases first to visualize the court and tribunal succession timeline.
lineage.timeline_chart_title: Case Volume by Court and Year
lineage.help_text: Click any bar segment to view cases from that court and year. Use the filters above to focus on specific court groups or time periods. The chart shows the transition from older tribunals (MRTA, RRTA) to AATA and then ARTA, as well as the evolution of lower courts from FMCA through FCCA to FedCFamC2G.
lineage.explainer_subtitle: Understanding Australian immigration court and tribunal succession
lineage.transition_impact_subtitle: Average case volume comparison: 2 years before vs 2 years after each court transition
lineage.loading_hint: Court lineage aggregates can take a few seconds on large datasets.

pipeline.auto_phases_info: The pipeline runs all three phases automatically with smart fallback strategies.
pipeline.fallback_info: If a crawl strategy fails, it rotates to the next one (direct → viewdb → keyword search).

llm_council.title: LLM IMMI Council
llm_council.subtitle: Direct multi-provider council with OpenAI, Gemini Pro, Anthropic Sonnet, then Gemini Flash for ranking, critique, voting, and synthesis.
llm_council.workflow_note: Designed for user-provided cases not already in record.
llm_council.workflow_step_1_desc: Enter your legal question and the full case-study facts, even when the case is not already recorded.
llm_council.workflow_step_2_desc: System searches the local IMMI-Case database first and retrieves the most relevant judgments.
llm_council.workflow_step_3_desc: OpenAI, Gemini Pro, and Anthropic answer independently, then Gemini Flash critiques and votes.
llm_council.workflow_step_4_desc: Receive a database-grounded mock judgment draft, consensus/conflict map, and cited sections.
llm_council.workflow_step_1: Step 1: Enter legal issue and case-study facts (even if case is not in record).
llm_council.workflow_step_2: Step 2: System searches local IMMI-Case database for closest precedents.
llm_council.workflow_step_3: Step 3: Three expert models answer independently and are judged by Gemini Flash.
llm_council.workflow_step_4: Step 4: Receive mock judgment draft, consensus/conflict map, and cited sections.
llm_council.advanced_subtitle: Expand to review model configuration and run provider health diagnostics.
llm_council.health_config_note: Config-only check validates API keys and model/prompt configuration without external calls.
llm_council.health_live_note: Live probe will call provider APIs and verify response availability.
llm_council.question_placeholder: Example: Compare strongest review grounds for visa cancellation where procedural fairness may be breached.
llm_council.context_placeholder: Describe facts, timeline, procedural events, and disputed findings
llm_council.case_study_placeholder: Describe user-provided facts, timeline, visa status, procedural events, and contested findings. This will be used to search local precedents and draft a mock judgment.
llm_council.case_study_note: Use concrete facts. The council will map these facts against similar cases in the current database.
llm_council.input_checklist_item_1: Timeline: key dates, notices, interviews, refusals/cancellations.
llm_council.input_checklist_item_2: Decision points: who decided what, and under which legal powers.
llm_council.input_checklist_item_3: Procedural issues: hearing fairness, evidence disputes, reasons adequacy.
llm_council.runtime_note: This runs 3 expert models, then Gemini Flash for ranking/critique/voting/synthesis, so response time may be longer.
llm_council.validation_question_required: Please enter your legal research question.
llm_council.moderator_title: Gemini Flash Ranking, Critique, Voting & Composition
llm_council.mock_judgment_note: Research simulation only. This is not legal advice or an actual judicial outcome.
llm_council.outcome_likelihood_tooltip: This percentage is a model-generated estimate based on available facts and cited precedents, not a judicial prediction or legal advice.
llm_council.law_section_open_search: Open legislation search for this section
llm_council.shared_law_confidence_note: Score is estimated from overlap consistency across the three expert model citations.
llm_council.shared_law_sections_note: This card only shows statutory sections that appear across all successful expert model answers.
llm_council.shared_law_sections_requires_three: Need all three expert model responses to compute shared sections.
llm_council.shared_law_sections_empty: No section is jointly cited by all three model answers.
llm_council.provider_law_sections_note: Expand each model to review the statutory sections extracted from that model's answer.
llm_council.provider_law_sections_failed_note: This model did not return a successful answer, so no section list is available.
llm_council.provider_law_sections_none_for_model: No identifiable statutory/regulatory section citation was extracted for this model.
llm_council.running_hint: Council is running. Waiting for all expert opinions and composition.
llm_council.idle_hint: Submit a question to generate a 3-model council analysis and Gemini Flash synthesis.
llm_council.retrieved_cases_note: These local IMMI-Case precedents were provided to the council as evidence context.
